title: The Day We Met
description: A short description of the memory, as long or short as you like.

title: What Are We Day
description: The day I embarrassed myself with that infamous question...

title: Our first big snow together
description: Face scuptulers in the garden table, Sammy the snowman, popadoms in the night, walkies with the doggies, and Frozen and hot chocolate with Mumsy.

title: Kelly Birthday!
description: The day that this grim place called earth was graced with the magnificance of your being, thus making it liveable, my love.

title: Matty Birthday
description: Wow Matty's birthday! Give him a kiss momma.

title: The keys to our first place together!
description: Not the most amazing place, but we make the most of it, as long as we are together.

title: Jiji gotcha day!
description: The first day of the new year, a fresh start for us to create more memories together.
